name: chase
description: Chase bank account access via Plaid. Chase does not expose a direct public API for individual account holders, so this plugin queries a linked Chase Item through Plaid's REST API. Read-only by default (accounts, balances, transactions, identity, ACH routing). Writes (Plaid Transfer) require Plaid enablement. Uses PLAID_CLIENT_ID, PLAID_SECRET, PLAID_ACCESS_TOKEN, and PLAID_ENV environment variables.
